method: Kostolany-inspired capital-cycle map. Rates are a primary transmission mechanism, but phase is governed by monetary, liquidity, psychology, market structure, and valuation axes.

market_structure_axis.label: Market structure
market_structure_axis.read: SPX above 50D / 200D; QQQ growth leadership confirms

valuation_axis.label: Valuation
valuation_axis.read: valuation pressure not fully modeled yet

broad_asset_posture.reason: Trend, liquidity, and earnings expectations support risk assets. Use ruled add zones, not chase.
broad_asset_posture.condition: Use ruled add zones, not chase.

phase_rule.condition: Use ruled add zones, not chase.

broad_asset_posture.tilt: Reduce marginal adds; favor profitable quality
broad_asset_posture.reason: Trend, liquidity, and earnings expectations support risk assets. Add only with route permission.
broad_asset_posture.condition: Add only with route permission. Stress adjustment: Reduce marginal adds; favor profitable quality.
broad_asset_posture.stress_adjustment: Reduce marginal adds; favor profitable quality

broad_asset_posture.reason: Trend, liquidity, and earnings expectations support risk assets. Upgrade only if breadth improves.

broad_asset_posture.tilt: Watch, do not accumulate aggressively until rates roll over
broad_asset_posture.reason: Trend, liquidity, and earnings expectations support risk assets. Add when rates roll over.
broad_asset_posture.condition: Add when rates roll over. Stress adjustment: Watch, do not accumulate aggressively until rates roll over.
broad_asset_posture.stress_adjustment: Watch, do not accumulate aggressively until rates roll over

broad_asset_posture.tilt: Small hedge if real-rate/geopolitical pressure confirms
broad_asset_posture.reason: Trend, liquidity, and earnings expectations support risk assets. Increase only if stress rises.
broad_asset_posture.condition: Increase only if stress rises. Stress adjustment: Small hedge if real-rate/geopolitical pressure confirms.
broad_asset_posture.stress_adjustment: Small hedge if real-rate/geopolitical pressure confirms

broad_asset_posture.tilt: Conditional if rate pressure is inflation-linked
broad_asset_posture.reason: Trend, liquidity, and earnings expectations support risk assets. Favor only with inflation/supply pressure.
broad_asset_posture.condition: Favor only with inflation/supply pressure. Stress adjustment: Conditional if rate pressure is inflation-linked.
broad_asset_posture.stress_adjustment: Conditional if rate pressure is inflation-linked

broad_asset_posture.reason: Trend, liquidity, and earnings expectations support risk assets. Deploy only into pullbacks or high-evidence ideas.
broad_asset_posture.condition: Deploy only into pullbacks or high-evidence ideas. Stress adjustment: Higher dry powder.

phase_rule.condition: Deploy only into pullbacks or high-evidence ideas.

broad_asset_posture.reason: Trend, liquidity, and earnings expectations support risk assets. Cut if liquidity beta breaks.
Trend, liquidity, and earnings expectations support risk assets. Evidence >= 80 or deep undervaluation with strong thesis.
broad_asset_posture.condition: Evidence >= 80 or deep undervaluation with strong thesis.

phase_rule.condition: Evidence >= 80 or deep undervaluation with strong thesis.

equity_subcategory_posture.condition: Only with liquidity and route confirmation.
Stability role, not primary upside engine.
Works when breadth and cyclicals participate.
Upgrade only if credit and breadth improve.
Favor if rates/curve help margins without credit stress.
Favor only if inflation/demand supports energy.

invalidation: SPX loses 200D or VIX stress rises above route threshold.

self_check.q1: A1–F notation remains visible but secondary to clear macro labels.
self_check.q2: Center prioritizes capital action first; stress type is shown underneath.
self_check.q3: First production version is clean/minimal; density can be added later.
